name: medcabinet-ai
description: Dental cabinet appointment and management platform for Dr Firas Sayari.

scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace shared && npm run dev --workspace frontend
scripts.dev:frontend: npm run build --workspace shared && npm run dev --workspace frontend
scripts.dev:backend: npm run build --workspace shared && npm run start:dev --workspace backend
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace shared && npm run build --workspace backend && npm run build --workspace frontend
scripts.build:vercel: npm run prisma:generate && npm run build --workspace shared && npm run build --workspace frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace frontend && npm run lint --workspace backend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace shared && npm run typecheck --workspace backend && npm run typecheck --workspace frontend && npm run typecheck:vercel
